sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95316" key="sku/lma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκύλ-μα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n95316.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hair plucked out</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόμης σκύλματα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.129</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maec.</author> </bibl>); <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκύλμα κόμης</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1474.tlg001:247" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">247</biblScope> </bibl> (Paul. Sil.).</sense> </entryFree>
